notes.content: P11 Tray phase: introduce crates/aura-tray as Aura facade over tray-icon + tray_icon::menu/muda. It exposes TrayConfig, TrayMenuItemSpec, TrayCommand, AuraTray; supports dynamic icon updates, tooltip/visibility, checkbox state, recursive submenus, and stable command IDs. Tray-enabled GPUI apps must use QuitMode::Explicit and retain AuraTray for process lifetime; Gallery/Docs should preview config without creating real OS tray side effects.

Packaging phase naming is finalized as crates/aura-packager plus xtask command entrypoint. aura-packager is a domain logic library (metadata, formats, manifest, checksum, validation); users run cargo xtask package ..., not cargo run -p aura-packager. packaging/ stores static icons/desktop/metainfo/entitlements/config.

directives.directive: Packaging/installer work must keep Aura as pure Rust + GPUI native apps. Do not convert aura-gallery/aura-docs to Tauri, do not introduce WebView/HTML/CSS/DOM runtime. Use xtask + cargo-packager-style tooling for installers; Tauri may only be referenced for packaging format ideas, not runtime architecture.
